commands.code: try: # ========================== # Get Log Message # ========================== log = User.getData("log_text") if log == None or log == "": log = "Unknown Event" # ========================== # Current Date & Time # ========================== current = libs.DateAndTime.now("Asia/Kolkata") date = current["date"] clock = current["time"] year, month, day = date.split("-") hour, minute, second = clock.split(":") hour = int(hour) ampm = "AM" if hour >= 12: ampm = "PM" if hour > 12: hour -= 12 if hour == 0: hour = 12 months = { "01":"Jan", "02":"Feb", "03":"Mar", "04":"Apr", "05":"May", "06":"Jun", "07":"Jul", "08":"Aug", "09":"Sep", "10":"Oct", "11":"Nov", "12":"Dec" } formatted_time = "{:02d} {} {} | {:02d}:{} {}".format( int(day), months[month], year, hour, minute, ampm ) # ========================== # Existing Logs # ========================== logs = User.getData("registration_logs") if logs == None: logs = "" # ========================== # Append New Log # ========================== logs += "\n• [{}] {}".format( formatted_time, log ) User.saveData( "registration_logs", logs.strip() ) User.deleteData("log_text") except Exception as e: Bot.sendMessage( "Registration Log Error\n\n"+str(e)+"", parse_mode="HTML" )

try: Bot.answerCallbackQuery(call.id) userid = User.getData("selected_worker") if userid == None: Bot.sendMessage( """❌ No Worker Selected Please open a worker application first. """, parse_mode="HTML" ) else: Bot.sendMessage( """📝 ADMIN NOTE ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Send the note you want to save. Example Private Instagram Fake Profile Approved after verification """, parse_mode="HTML" ) Bot.handleNextCommand("save_admin_note") except Exception as e: Bot.sendMessage( "Admin Note Error\n\n"+str(e)+"", parse_mode="HTML" )
